title: Language Body Sections
description: Markdown body sections expected in every language file. Not frontmatter — extracted by ingest, never validated by JSON Schema.

## Overview.description: One-to-two sentence description of the language and its primary use case. Write once on creation; do not overwrite.

## Strengths.description: Bullet list of strengths noted by the user. Only populated from explicit user opinion, never inferred. Append new bullets; never duplicate.

## Weaknesses.description: Bullet list of weaknesses noted by the user. Only populated from explicit user opinion, never inferred. Append new bullets; never duplicate.

## Notes.description: Free-form observations recorded verbatim from the user. Append paragraphs; preserve existing text.
